name: BuildBid
description: AI-powered construction estimating application that helps GCs and estimators generate accurate bids faster. Automates quantity takeoffs, material pricing, and labor estimation.
current_state: Estimating module complete with core takeoff functionality. Lot model persistence is in progress. PDF import for blueprints working. User auth and multi-tenant setup done.
key_features: Material price database with regional pricing
target_users: General contractors at small-to-mid firms (10-100 employees)
known_issues: Lot model data not persisted between sessions
PDF import accuracy drops on hand-drawn blueprints
Material pricing requires manual refresh (no live feed yet)
No mobile app — estimators often work on-site
Multi-user collaboration on same bid not yet supported
next_priorities: Live material pricing integration (RSMeans or similar)
target_market: US construction industry, $12B estimating software market
